# Pull Request

## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## How verified

- [ ] Tests added/updated and pass
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt` passes
- [ ] CI checks pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed (describe below if applicable)

For UI changes, include a screenshot or short screencast:

<!-- Paste screenshots or drag-and-drop here -->

## Details

Any additional details that help reviewers understand the change:
- What problem does this solve?
- Any design decisions or trade-offs?
- Any known limitations or follow-up work needed?

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages are clear and terse
- [ ] No breaking changes (or documented if intentional)
- [ ] Related issues are linked (e.g., closes #123)
